title: Iron Armor to Oxidizing Copper Armor
description: Replaces iron armor with copper armor that rusts based on durability.
body:
OPTIFINE REQUIRED

Replaces iron armor with copper armor that rusts based on durability.

![All oxidations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c7a043130e800b7dbdd98ae986c228ed8d2b404.png)
